videos.title: [삼성전자 주가 전망] 결국 주말에 터졌다! 미 증시 난리 났습니다! 이건 꼭 확인하셔야 합니다! 삼성전자 주식 분석 #삼성전자주가전망 #삼성전자주가 #삼성전자
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 삼성전자의 신고가를 만들 준비가 되었다는 소식이 알려졌습니다. 따라서 시장 변동성이 발생할 수 있으므로 대응하기 위해 주의하시길 바랍니다.
2. 현재 삼성전자는 가액 종목으로서 차트부터 시작하여 추가적인 호재를 보이고 있습니다. 또한 지금 극심한 저평가 구간이라고 합니다.
3. 1분기의 실적은 엄청난 성과를 보여주었으나, 2분기부터 4분기까지 더 올라갈 것으로 예상됩니다. 따라서 디멘탈리(long-term) 관찰이 필요합니다. 외국인 지분도 추가로 들어올 것으로 예상되며, 시장의 컨센서스 상향 조정이 일어날 것입니다.

videos.title: [대한광통신 주가 전망] 주말 놀라운소식 결국 3천억 유상증자 매도폭탄 악재 시작? 큰손의 평단가에서 앞으로 주가 이렇게 대응하시면 됩니다
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. 대한광통신의 주가에서 연기금이 3천억의 유상증자를 대기하고 있어서 지속적인 악재가 발생하고 있다는 것
2. 그런데도 큰손의 평단가에서 목표 주가는 상승을 하고 있으며, 이는 대한광통신과 1000%의 수익을 올리는 기회로 보인다는 것
3. 따라서 영상 끝까지 잘 따라오시고 구독과 좋아요를 눌러주세요.

videos.title: [자막뉴스] 협상장 가기도 전 ‘엇갈린 메시지’...이란 “우라늄 절대 포기 못 해” / YTN
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. The possibility of a U.S.-Iran meeting on the 20th in Pakistan is high, according to various media outlets, including Wall Street Journal and CNN. The U.S. negotiation team is currently waiting for the meeting.
2. Despite Trump's self-confidence that most major issues have been resolved, Iran's stance differs significantly, particularly on the issue of uranium export, which remains unresolved.
3. Internal disagreements within Iran are also evident, with hardliners opposing any concessions and the situation regarding who is making key decisions remaining unclear. Speaker of the Iranian Parliament, Ali Larijani, has threatened to re-impose sanctions if the U.S. continues its naval blockade.

videos.title: "Iran says it will hand over uranium"... Everyone starts 'raising 370 trillion won' together / SB...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Trump 대통령은 Iran이 핵무기를 포기하고, 60% 고농축 우라늄(440kg)을 해외로 내보내면 370조 원의 지원금을 제공할 것이라고 말했습니다.
2. Trump는 이 지원금을 만들기 위해 Arab countries의 참여를 기대하며, Iran은 이 지원금으로는 부족한 것으로 알려졌습니다.
3. Trump의 말이 사실이라면, Iran의 핵무기 포기와 미국의 경제적 지원 규모가 두 나라의 협상 결과를 좌우할 것으로 예상됩니다.

videos.title: "30 Trillion Won Loss if Strike on the 18th"... Samsung Electronics Union Warns of 'Semiconductor...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics, a company that set a record in semiconductor production due to the current boom, is experiencing internal conflict within its union. The union has officially announced a strike starting from next month and warned of potential losses up to 30 trillion won if the strike continues for 18 days.
2. The union demands a performance bonus of 45 trillion won, stating that the semiconductor plants in five locations (Samsung's headquarters in Gyeonggi-do, Pyeongtaek, Hwaseong, Onyang in Chonan, and a packaging facility in Suwon and Cheonan) will be shut down during the strike.
3. The union argues that they need fair compensation to retain employees, as 200 employees have reportedly left Samsung for SK hynix. However, the company disputes this claim, stating that they are limiting performance bonuses in a stock form rather than cash, to encourage employees to work longer.

videos.title: "30조 손실 입을 것"…40조 달라는 삼성전자 노조 '파업 으름장' [뉴스9]
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics labor union has announced plans for a long-term strike, warning of a potential 30 trillion won loss to the company due to the strike. They are demanding a performance bonus of 40 trillion won.
2. This is the first official recognition of more than half of the labor unions at Samsung Electronics. The union has reaffirmed its intention to carry out the strike as planned, starting from next month.
3. The union claims that the management views them as a target for control rather than a partner in management. They plan to start a strike on February 21st and continue until the 28th, potentially causing losses of at least 20 trillion won per day, considering backup equipment. The demanded performance bonus of 40 trillion won is significantly more than the dividends paid to 40 million shareholders last year and exceeds Samsung's annual research and development costs. This could lead to a decrease in global trust due to production issues. Samsung's labor union has called for direct negotiations with the CEO, I Rhee-yong.

videos.title: [News Box] Union warns of large-scale general strike; then what Samsung Electronics applied for is..
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. Samsung Electronics has applied for a court injunction to prevent union strikes at major factories, citing illegal blockades by the union. The union is demanding 15% of business profits as performance pay and has announced plans for a large-scale strike on May 23rd, following a meeting on the 23rd.
2. Samsung Electronics reported record-breaking earnings of 57 trillion won in Q1 this year, but the union is demanding 40.5 trillion won as performance pay for the year based on projected annual semiconductor profits of 270 billion won.
3. The annual shareholders' meeting took place amidst good weather, with around 1200 shareholders attending. Despite a decline in competition last year, Samsung Electronics emphasized its commitment to maintaining competitive edge through advanced semiconductor technology and plans to prepare for future external changes proactively by 2026.

videos.title: [Weekend Good Morning Mijumi] The power of the US market. MSCI Korea finally breaks all-time high...
videos.subtitle_summary:
1. MSCI Korea 주가는 2026년 4월 18일 토요일에 전체적인 최고기록을 갈아치우며, 35년 만에 다시 대기록을 세웠습니다.
2. 미국 주식시장도 13일 연속으로 상승하고 있어서, 나스닥 지수를 기준으로 보면 1992년에 이루어진 최장기 상승을 이어가고 있습니다.
3. 주식시장의 분위기는 완전히 뭐 끝났다는 분위기가 이어지고 있으며, 트럼프 대통령도 이란에 대해서 곧 해결될 수 있다는 얘기를 하고 있습니다.
